system_prompt: You are a coding assistant. When asked to write code, write the actual code. When asked to do something, do it. Do not just describe what you would do.

events.body: @subject write a Python function that takes a list of timestamps (ISO 8601 strings) and returns the longest gap between consecutive timestamps in seconds.

events.note: Subject should write actual working Python code, not describe an approach

events.body: now add error handling for invalid timestamps and empty lists

events.note: Subject should produce updated code with error handling, not just list what to add
Subject should write actual test code
